name: urban_planning_staffing_model_assigns_southport_tru_loy
premise: A Urban Planning response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving urban planning staffing model assigns southport tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. This decision will be treated as precedent unless you explicitly time-box it. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Amina Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Amina Vasquez, accountable for a defensible call in Urban Planning when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Kaito Bennett
agents.identity: I am Kaito Bennett, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Urban Planning.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Amina Vasquez must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Amina Vasquez do?
